segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Hi Hai, are you free after class? I want to join Mr. Wolf's reading club.

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Sure, Lin! It meets every Friday at four in the school library.

qs.q: When does the reading club meet?
qs.why: 男生说 every Friday at four in the library。

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Lin, how do you usually go to school?

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: I usually ride my bike, but today I took the bus because it was raining.

qs.q: How did Lin go to school today?
qs.why: today I took the bus because it was raining。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Excuse me, where is the school library?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Go straight and turn left. It's next to the dining hall.

qs.why: It's next to the dining hall（在食堂旁边）。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: What's your favourite subject, Hai?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: English! Mr. Wolf makes every lesson fun and warm.

qs.why: English! Mr. Wolf makes every lesson fun。

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: It's sunny today. Shall we play football after school?

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Good idea, but let's finish our homework first.

qs.why: let's finish our homework first（先做作业）。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: How much is this English dictionary?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: It's forty yuan, but there's a discount today, so it's only thirty.

qs.q: How much is the dictionary today?
qs.why: there's a discount today, so it's only thirty（打折后 30）。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: You look pale, Lin. What's wrong?

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: I have a bad cold and a headache.

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: You'd better drink more water and have a good rest.

qs.why: drink more water and have a good rest。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Hi Hai, do you have any plans for Saturday?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Not yet, Lin. Why do you ask?

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Mr. Wolf's book club is visiting the city library. Would you like to join us?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: That sounds great! What time shall we meet?

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Let's meet at the school gate at eight thirty in the morning.

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Perfect. I'll bring my reading notes.

qs.q: Where are they going on Saturday?
When and where will they meet?
ops: At the school gate at eight thirty
qs.why: meet at the school gate at eight thirty。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Attention, please. This Saturday, Academy Valley will hold its yearly English Festival. There will be a speech contest in the morning and an English movie in the afternoon. Please come to the school hall at nine o'clock, and don't forget to bring your student card.

qs.q: When will the English Festival be held?

qs.why: don't forget to bring your student card。

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Yesterday was a special day for Lin. She gave her first English speech in front of the whole school. At first she was very nervous, but she remembered Mr. Wolf's words: make yourself special and kind. In the end, everyone clapped for her.

ops: She gave her first English speech
qs.why: She gave her first English speech。

qs.q: How did Lin feel at first?
qs.why: At first she was very nervous。

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Reading is one of the best habits in the world. It opens your mind and takes you to places you have never been. Scientists say that people who read every day feel happier and less stressed. So why not pick up a book today and read for just twenty minutes?

qs.q: According to the passage, what does reading do for us?
How long does the speaker suggest reading?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Mr. Wolf is not a real wolf, of course. He is our English teacher in Academy Valley. He is strict but kind, and he always tells us to make ourselves special and kind. Every Friday, he holds a reading club after class, where students share their favourite stories.

qs.q: What does Mr. Wolf do every Friday?
qs.why: Every Friday, he holds a reading club。

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Listen and repeat after me. Environment. Protect. Recycle. Weekend. Because. However. Little by little, we all improve.
